user_query:
I’m coordinating our team’s rebuttal to ABP Nadu’s review of the psychological thriller “MindMaze,” and I want the draft to reflect the latest team priorities instead of the critic’s take. Please do the following in this workspace:

1) Inspect input/team to detect the newest feedback file by version suffix (choose the file named feedback_v{N}.jsonl with the highest numeric N). Do not hardcode the file name.

2) Combine that feedback with the canonical points in input/points/points_catalog.csv and validate the references against input/reviews/abp_nadu_review.md:
   - Treat each JSONL line as a single vote for the referenced point_id from one team member. Aggregate votes per point_id.
   - Only keep points that have at least 1 vote AND whose referenced_paragraphs all exist as [pX] markers in input/reviews/abp_nadu_review.md.
   - Compute votes_count for each kept point and priority_score = (votes_count * 2) + severity (severity comes from points_catalog.csv).

3) Produce a ranked CSV at output/reports/rebuttal_points_ranked.csv with header:
   point_id,title,category,severity,votes_count,priority_score,referenced_paragraphs
   Sort rows by priority_score descending, then votes_count descending, then point_id ascending.

4) Edit the existing document input/draft/rebuttal_draft.md in place. Between the markers <!-- SYNC:START --> and <!-- SYNC:END -->, replace any existing content with a numbered list of the top 5 points from the ranked CSV (in the same order). For each item, include: point_id, title, category, severity, votes_count, priority_score, and referenced_paragraphs (list the paragraph IDs, not the text). Keep the rest of the document unchanged.

5) Write a synchronization summary to output/changes_summary.md including:
   - selected_feedback_file (the chosen input/team/feedback_v*.jsonl file),
   - total_points_considered_before_filter (unique point_ids from points_catalog.csv),
   - total_points_after_filter (after applying the vote and paragraph-validation rules),
   - dropped_points as a list of {point_id, reason} where reason is either "no_votes" or "invalid_references",
   - inserted_items_count (how many items you placed between the markers in the draft).

Notes and constraints:
- Do not fetch anything from the Internet; use only the provided files.
- Referenced paragraph IDs must exactly match the [pX] markers present in input/reviews/abp_nadu_review.md.
- The draft must be modified in place at input/draft/rebuttal_draft.md.
- All output paths must match those specified above.

Deliverables:
- output/reports/rebuttal_points_ranked.csv (ranked points)
- Modified input/draft/rebuttal_draft.md (with the synced top 5 section)
- output/changes_summary.md (sync summary) All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
